body.u: I left school, and had to look for a job, I throughtthought I found a job that I liked but it would mean working nights which I did not fancy and the money we not very good. It was a chifechef at a hotel in London. As I could not find a job I wrote oftoThantthatCollageCollege for a ChifeChef course I was expect when I was 17 and stayed theirthere for three years. When I come out of ThantthatCollageCollege I had to wait for a few weeks to find a job, then I looked in a newspaper, it said chifechef wanted at London Hotel so I wrote to see if I could a interview, they asked me if I would come up, so I did, they seemed friend the wages were good, and you got hour of for lunch I did not to start until 9 am then when went to lunch at 2 pm then back until 5 pm, so I took the job. I did not have to work on Sundays that was good becauesbecause I had a hobeyhobbey football. I played for the twontown local team, top of the league in two cup finals. I planned to get married when I was 26 years old.

When I was 26 I got married my job as a chiefechef was in rocks, as the hotel had been bunt, blady , but I would not be out of a job, becauesbecause I was offered a concertcontract with a formousfamousfootmallfootball team which I took, At 27 I played my debut against Liverpool which was a hard game we just about won 5-4 that was theythe only game I played all season, so I would see what would happen just year not much so I asked for a transfore. I got it when I was 31.

I played in divisondivision 4 with Reading I won a cup couple of medlesmedals with the {Illegible} for the next 9 years I was happy at Reading, my wife got her first baby a boy we called him Paul, he grow up and followed his dad’s footsteps. When had another kid a few years later, my wife was taketakenill, she had to stay in hospitehospital for a few weeks.

So the death of my wife, so I had to look after the children, a boy and a girl, the boy just in the most import time of his life, when he had to take his exam, if you passed any ‘o’ level he would ten pound, and for CSE five pound. I enededended up paying 45 pounds for the exam, five six CSE and two ‘o’ level my soneson left us and went into the army.

I had to retire from football but was offered a {illegible} has a mangermanager, which I took up we did not do well in the first year coming six from bottom, but the next two years were good fishing 5 and 7 and the year after that we won promiptionpromotion to divisondivision 3, I was on the {illegible} of 60 I was only my now as my daughter left to go with her boyfriend, at 63 {could be 65?} I retired from football all together I still watched a bit I had to retilerretirebecauesbecause I was in a road crushcrash and could not see out of one eye. A 70 years old I had to go to an old peoples home as the house become totoo big for me so i sold it by I only last a few years there.
